title: Method and apparatus for facilitating a software update process over a network
abstract: An apparatus for facilitating an update process of a software program is disclosed. The apparatus comprises a logic processing module arranged to maintain a connection with a network device, receive information for updating a software program from the network device, perform an updating of the software program based on the received information, and process one or more user requests. The apparatus further comprises an interface module arranged to receive a user request, store the received user request when the updating of the software program by the logic processing module is in progress, store the received user request, and after the updating of the software program completes, provide the stored user request to the logic processing module for processing.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. An apparatus for facilitating an update process of a software program, comprising : a logic processing module arranged to: maintain a connection with a network device; receive information for updating a software program from the network device; perform an updating of the software program based on the received information; and process one or more user requests; and an interface module arranged to: receive a user request, when the updating of the software program by the logic processing module is in progress, store the received user request; after the updating of the software program completes, provide the stored user request to the logic processing module for processing. 2. The apparatus according to claim 1 further comprising: a communication processing module arranged to perform a format conversion of information transmitted between the logic processing module and the network device. 3. The apparatus according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the logic processing module is further arranged to: 

 receive, from the network device, an instruction to perform the updating of the software program; after receiving the instruction, transmit a request for downloading information for updating the software program, the request including information about a cuirent version of the software program; and receive the requested information. 4. The apparatus according to claim 3, wherein the logic processing module is further arranged to: acquire, from the network device, verification information for verifying the requested information; and perform the updating of the software program based on the requested information after verifying the requested information. 5. The apparatus according to any one of claims 1-4, wherein the logic processing module is further arranged to: transmit, periodically to the network device within a predetermined interval, one or more heart beat request packets; monitor for a heart beat response packet from the network device after transmitting the one or more heart beat requests; and determine whether the connection with the network device is maintained based on 

 whether the heart beat response is received. 6. The apparatus according to any one of claims 1-5, wherein the logic processing module is implemented by a dynamic programming language. 7. The apparatus according to claim 6, wherein the interface module is arranged to: activate one or more computation resources for performing the updating of the software program. 8. An apparatus for facilitating an update process of a software program, comprising: a connection establishment module arranged to maintain a connection with a client device; and a software update information transmission module arranged to: transmit, to the client device, an instruction to perform the updating of the software program; receive, from the client device, a request for downloading information for updating the software program, the request including information about a current version of the software program; determine the requested information based on the information about the current version; and transmit the requested information to the client device. 9. The apparatus according to claim 8, wherein the software update information transmission module is further arranged to: transmit verification information to the client device, wherein the verification information enables the client device to verify the information for updating the software program received from the apparatus. 10. The apparatus according to any one of claims 8 and 9, wherein the connection establishment module is further arranged to: receive one or more heart beat request packets from the client device; and transmit a heartbeat response packet to the client device to indicate that connection is maintained. 11. The apparatus according to any one of claims 8-10, further comprising: a version management module arranged to manage update infonnation that correspond to one or more versions of a software program to be updated. 12. A computer-implemented method for facilitating an update process of a software program, comprising: maintaining a connection with a network device; receiving information for updating a software program from the network device; 

 performing an updating of the software program based on the received information; when performing the updating of the software program: receiving a user request; storing the received user request; after the updating of the software program completes, processing the stored user request. 13. The computer- implemented method according to claim 12, further comprising: performing a format conversion of information received from network device. 14. The computer-implemented method according to claim 12 or 13, wherein performing an updating of the software program based on the received information comprises: receiving, from the network device, an instruction to perform the updating of the software program; after receiving the instruction, transmitting a request for downloading information for updating the software program, the request including information about a current version of the software program; and receiving the requested information. 15. The computer- implemented method according to claim 14, wherein performing an updating of the software program based on the received information comprises: acquiring, from the network device, verification information for verifying the requested information; and performing the updating of the software program based on the requested information after verifying the requested information. 16. The computer-implemented method according to any one of claims 12-15, wherein maintaining a connection with a network device comprises: transmitting, periodically to the network device within a predetermined interval, one or more heart beat request packets; monitoring for a heart beat response packet from the network device after transmitting the one or more heart beat requests; and determining whether the connection with the network device is maintained based on whether the heart beat response is received. 17. The computer-implemented method according to any one of claims 12-16, wherein the user requests are processed using a dynamic programming language. 18. The computer-implemented method according to claim 17, wherein performing an updating of the software program based on the received information comprises: 

 activating one or more computation resources for performing the updating of the software program. 19. A computer-implemented method for facilitating an update process of a software program, comprising: maintaining a connection with a client device; transmitting, to the client device, an instruction to perform the updating of the software program; receiving, from the client device, a request for downloading information for updating the software program, the request including information about a current version of the software program; determining the requested information based on the information about the current version; and transmitting the requested information to the client device. 20. The computer-implemented method according to claim 19, further comprising: transmitting verification information to the client device, wherein the verification information enables the client device to verify the information for updating the software program received from the apparatus. 21. The computer-implemented method according to claim 20, wherein the maintaining communication connection with one or more user apparatuses includes: receiving one or more heart beat request packets from the client device; and transmitting a heartbeat response packet to the client device to indicate that connection is maintained. 22. The computer-implemented method according to any one of claims 19-21, further comprising: managing update information that correspond to one or more versions of a software program to be updated. 23. A non-transitory computer readable medium that stores a set of instructions that is executable by at least one processor of a device to cause the device to perform a method for facilitating an update process of a software program, the method comprising: maintaining a connection with a network device; receiving information for updating a software program from the network device; performing an updating of the software program based on the received information; when performing the updating of the software program: receiving a user request; storing the received user request; after the updating of the software program completes, processing the stored user 

 request. 24. A non-transitory computer readable medium that stores a set of instructions that is executable by at least one processor of a device to cause the device to perform a method for facilitating an update process of a software program, the method comprising: maintaining a connection with a client device; transmitting, to the client device, an instruction to perform the updating of the software program; receiving, from the client device, a request for downloading information for updating the software program, the request including information about a current version of the software program; determining the requested information based on the information about the current version; and transmitting the requested information to the client device.
